entries.name: playwright-mcp
entries.description: Browser automation via accessibility snapshots — no vision model needed.
entries.author: microsoft
entries.description_zh: 用可访问性快照驱动浏览器自动化，无需视觉模型。
entries.description_en: Browser automation via accessibility snapshots — no vision model needed.
entries.long_zh:
playwright-mcp 是微软出品的 Model Context Protocol 服务，让 LLM 通过结构化的可访问性树而非截图来操作网页。确定性强、token 高效，已成为 agent 网页自动化的首选。

适合网页回归测试、表单填写与抓取动态内容。
entries.long_en:
playwright-mcp is Microsoft’s Model Context Protocol server that lets LLMs drive web pages through a structured accessibility tree instead of screenshots. Deterministic and token-efficient, it has become the go-to for agentic web automation.

Great for regression testing, form filling and scraping dynamic content.
entries.sec_note_zh: 微软官方维护，纳入前已完成安全审计。
entries.sec_note_en: Officially maintained by Microsoft; security-audited before inclusion.

entries.name: servers
entries.description: The official reference collection of MCP servers — dozens ready to use.
entries.author: modelcontextprotocol
entries.description_zh: 官方维护的参考 MCP 服务集合，几十种现成连接。
entries.description_en: The official reference collection of MCP servers — dozens ready to use.
entries.long_zh: modelcontextprotocol/servers 是由 Anthropic 与社区共建的官方参考实现库，收录文件系统、Git、数据库、搜索等数十种 MCP 服务，是了解与起步 MCP 的最佳入口。
entries.long_en: modelcontextprotocol/servers is the official reference library, built by Anthropic with the community. It bundles dozens of MCP servers — filesystem, Git, databases, search and more — the best place to learn and start with MCP.
entries.sec_note_zh: 官方维护，持续审查贡献。

entries.name: github-mcp-server
entries.description: Let agents work with repos, pull requests and workflows directly.
entries.author: github
entries.description_zh: 让 agent 直接操作仓库、PR 与 workflow。
entries.description_en: Let agents work with repos, pull requests and workflows directly.
entries.long_zh: github-mcp-server 是 GitHub 官方的 MCP 服务，把仓库、Issue、Pull Request 与 Actions workflow 暴露为 agent 可调用的工具，打通 AI 工具与整个 GitHub 生态。
entries.long_en: github-mcp-server is GitHub’s official MCP server, exposing repositories, issues, pull requests and Actions workflows as agent-callable tools — bridging AI tools with the whole GitHub ecosystem.
entries.sec_note_zh: GitHub 官方维护，OAuth 权限可控。
entries.sec_note_en: Officially maintained by GitHub; scoped OAuth permissions.

entries.name: Figma-Context-MCP
entries.description: Feed Figma design context to your agent for pixel-accurate builds.
entries.author: GLips
entries.description_zh: 把 Figma 设计上下文喂给 agent，实现像素级还原。
entries.description_en: Feed Figma design context to your agent for pixel-accurate builds.
entries.long_zh: Figma-Context-MCP（Framelink）读取 Figma 选中框架的布局与样式数据，以结构化上下文交给 agent，让模型据此生成更贴近设计稿的代码。
entries.long_en: Figma-Context-MCP (Framelink) reads layout and style data from selected Figma frames and hands it to the agent as structured context, so the model builds code that matches the design far more closely.
entries.sec_note_zh: 社区项目，安装前请阅读源码。
entries.sec_note_en: Community project — read the source before installing.

entries.name: supabase-mcp
entries.description: Connect your Supabase / Postgres database to your agent.
entries.author: supabase-community
entries.description_zh: 把 Supabase / Postgres 数据库连接给你的 agent。
entries.description_en: Connect your Supabase / Postgres database to your agent.
entries.long_zh: supabase-mcp 让 agent 以受控权限访问 Supabase 项目：查询数据、管理表结构与读取日志，只读模式与权限范围一应俱全。
entries.long_en: supabase-mcp gives agents permissioned access to a Supabase project: query data, manage schema and read logs, with read-only mode and scoped permissions.
entries.sec_note_zh: 社区维护，权限范围可控。

entries.name: manim
entries.description: Generate mathematical animations from code — beloved by technical creators.
entries.author: ManimCommunity
entries.description_zh: 用代码生成数学动画，技术内容创作者最爱。
entries.description_en: Generate mathematical animations from code — beloved by technical creators.
entries.long_zh: manim 是社区版的数学动画引擎（源自 3Blue1Brown）。作为技能接入后，agent 可以把概念描述转成干净的可视化动画，非常适合教学与技术内容创作。
entries.long_en: manim is the community edition of the mathematical animation engine (born from 3Blue1Brown). Wired in as a skill, an agent can turn concept descriptions into clean animated visualizations — perfect for teaching and technical content.
entries.sec_note_zh: 活跃社区维护，纳入前已复核。

entries.name: goose
entries.description: A local-first, open-source AI agent that loads any extension.
entries.author: block
entries.description_zh: 本地优先的开源 AI agent，可装载任意扩展。
entries.description_en: A local-first, open-source AI agent that loads any extension.
entries.long_zh: goose 是 Block 出品的开源 agent，跑在你本地、可装载 MCP 扩展来执行真实任务：写代码、跑命令、调用工具。隐私友好且高度可定制。
entries.long_en: goose is Block’s open-source agent that runs on your machine and loads MCP extensions to do real work: write code, run commands, call tools. Privacy-friendly and highly customizable.
entries.sec_note_zh: 经审核者复核，行为可审计。

entries.name: cline
entries.description: An autonomous coding agent in your editor — edits files and runs commands.
entries.author: cline
entries.description_zh: 编辑器里的自主编码 agent，可读写文件、跑命令。
entries.description_en: An autonomous coding agent in your editor — edits files and runs commands.
entries.long_zh: cline 是一个开源的自主编码 agent，直接在编辑器里工作：逐文件编辑、运行终端命令、调用浏览器，每一步都在你的批准下进行。
entries.long_en: cline is an open-source autonomous coding agent that works right in your editor: edits files step by step, runs terminal commands and drives a browser — each action gated by your approval.
entries.sec_note_zh: 每步操作需用户批准，行为透明。
entries.sec_note_en: Every action requires user approval; transparent behavior.

entries.name: OpenHands
entries.description: An autonomous software engineer that codes, runs commands and browses.
entries.author: All-Hands-AI
entries.description_zh: 能写代码、跑命令、上网的自主软件工程 agent。
entries.description_en: An autonomous software engineer that codes, runs commands and browses.
entries.long_zh: OpenHands（原 OpenDevin）是一个自主软件工程 agent 平台：它能修改代码、执行命令、浏览网页与调用 API，在沙箱中完成端到端的开发任务。
entries.long_en: OpenHands (formerly OpenDevin) is an autonomous software-engineering agent platform: it modifies code, runs commands, browses the web and calls APIs to complete end-to-end dev tasks in a sandbox.
entries.sec_note_zh: 沙箱执行，经审核者复核。

entries.name: swarm
entries.description: A lightweight multi-agent orchestration template — handoffs and routing.
entries.author: openai
entries.description_zh: 轻量多智能体编排模板，演示交接与路由。
entries.description_en: A lightweight multi-agent orchestration template — handoffs and routing.
entries.long_zh: swarm 是 OpenAI 的实验性多智能体编排框架，用极简的原语演示 agent 之间的交接与路由。作为模板克隆即可起步搭建你自己的多 agent 系统。
entries.long_en: swarm is OpenAI’s experimental multi-agent orchestration framework that demonstrates handoffs and routing between agents with minimal primitives. Clone it as a template to bootstrap your own multi-agent system.
entries.sec_note_zh: 官方示例项目，作为起点推荐。
entries.sec_note_en: Official sample project; recommended as a starting point.

entries.name: ai
entries.description: Build agent apps with the AI SDK and ship to Vercel in one click.
entries.author: vercel
entries.description_zh: 用 AI SDK 搭建 agent 应用，一键部署到 Vercel。
entries.description_en: Build agent apps with the AI SDK and ship to Vercel in one click.
entries.long_zh: vercel/ai（AI SDK）提供统一的模型接口、流式 UI 原语与工具调用，让你用 React/Next.js 快速搭建 agent 应用，并一键部署到 Vercel。
entries.long_en: vercel/ai (the AI SDK) provides a unified model interface, streaming UI primitives and tool calling, so you can build agent apps with React/Next.js and ship them to Vercel in one click.
entries.sec_note_zh: 官方维护，纳入前已审计。

entries.name: langgraph
entries.description: Orchestrate stateful, multi-step agent workflows as graphs.
entries.author: langchain-ai
entries.description_zh: 用图来编排有状态、多步骤的 agent 工作流。
entries.description_en: Orchestrate stateful, multi-step agent workflows as graphs.
entries.long_zh: langgraph 用有向图来描述 agent 工作流：节点是步骤、边是状态流转，内置持久化、断点续跑与人类介入，适合构建可靠的长流程 agent。
entries.long_en: langgraph models agent workflows as directed graphs: nodes are steps, edges are state transitions, with built-in persistence, resumption and human-in-the-loop — ideal for reliable long-running agents.
entries.sec_note_zh: 经审核者复核，推荐生产使用。
